response:
I want 10 weaknesses of a major technology company from 2023, formatted similarly to the provided examples:

1. [Company Name]'s earnings fell [X]% from 2021 to 2022.
2. [Company Name]'s EPS down $[X.XX] in 2022 from the previous year.
3. [Company Name] share prices down [X]% from 2021 to 2022.
4. Entirely dependent on demand for a single product category, [Product Type].
5. Total liabilities increased from $[X,XXX,XXX] to $[X,XXX,XXX] from 2021 to 2022.
6. [Company Name] produced [X]% fewer units of [Product] in the first half of 2022 as a result of weak demand from [Customer Segment] due to [External Event].
7. [Competitor Name] [Product Division] sales up [X]% from 2021 to 2022; [Company Name] has no comparable offerings.
8. [Competitor Name] achieved its goal to provide [Specific Feature] in [X]% of its [Product Line] by [Date]. [Company Name]'s products lack this feature.
9. Sales to [Company Name]'s top ten customers represented approximately [X]% of their net sales during fiscal year 2021.
10. [Company Name] faces multiple pending lawsuits in 2022, from [Charge Type] to [Violation Type].
